# UC-15.4.3 · APC UPS SNMP Output Load Approaching Rated Capacity

## Description

Running UPS near nameplate kVA shortens battery runtime nonlinearly and risks overload alarms during transfer.

## Value

Drives rack power rebalancing before refresh cycles.

## Implementation

(1) Set warning 80%, critical 90%. (2) Join to PDU data for attribution.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-4h
| eval load_pct=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputLoad, upsOutputPercentLoad, ""))
| where load_pct>80
| stats latest(load_pct) as load_pct latest(_time) as seen by ups_name
```

## Visualization

Gauge load; top-N UPS table.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
